---
title: "Unit 1: Trigonometry"
number-sections: true
number-depth: 2
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{python}
#| output: false
import sys, os
sys.path.insert(0, os.path.abspath('../../assets'))
sys.path.insert(0, os.path.abspath('../unit1-trigonometry'))
from Trigonometry import generate
from collections import defaultdict

data = generate(
    types=[
        # LT1 — Labelling
        "label_sides",
        # LT2 — Ratios
        "write_ratio",
        "identify_ratio",
        # LT3 — Find a side
        "find_side_sin",
        "find_side_cos",
        "find_side_tan",
        "find_side_hyp_sin",
        "find_side_hyp_cos",
        "find_side_hyp_tan",
        # LT4 — Find an angle
        "find_angle_sin",
        "find_angle_cos",
        "find_angle_tan",
        # LT5 — Elevation & depression
        "elevation_basic",
        "depression_basic",
        "elevation_word",
        "depression_word",
        "shadow_flagpole",
        "hill_gradient",
        "train_gradient",
        "elevation_depression_pair",
        "kite_height",
        # LT6 — Multi-step
        "multi_step_two_triangles",
        "multi_step_bearing",
        "ladder_safety",
        "ramp_angle",
        "two_triangles_vertex",
        "ratio_split_angle",
        "isosceles_split",
        "bearing_triangle",
        "cliff_lighthouse",
        "circle_chord_radius",
        "flagpole_two_elevations",
        "cliff_boat_closer",
        "helicopter_overhead",
    ],
    seed           = 42,
    show_solutions = True,
)
exercises = data["_exercises_qmd"]

grouped = defaultdict(list)
for ex in exercises:
    grouped[ex["difficulty"]].append(ex)
```

## 🎯 Learning Targets

{{< include Trigonometry-Learning-Targets.qmd >}}


## 🗂️ Formula Card

{{< include Geo-Trig-formulas.qmd >}}


## 📝 Practice Problems

:::::::::: panel-tabset

### 🟢 Easy

```{python}
#| output: asis
for ex in grouped.get("easy", []):
    print(ex["rendered"])
```

::: math-sep
∑ × π ÷ √ ◆ ∞ ± ∫ ≠ Δ
:::

### 🟡 Medium

```{python}
#| output: asis
for ex in grouped.get("medium", []):
    print(ex["rendered"])
```

::: math-sep
∑ × π ÷ √ ◆ ∞ ± ∫ ≠ Δ
:::

### 🔴 Challenging

```{python}
#| output: asis
for ex in grouped.get("hard", []):
    print(ex["rendered"])
```

::: math-sep
∑ × π ÷ √ ◆ ∞ ± ∫ ≠ Δ
:::

::::::::::

## ⚡ Test Your Knowledge {#sec-trig-worksheet}

```{=html}
<link rel="stylesheet" href="../../assets/worksheet.css">
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/pyodide/v0.25.0/full/pyodide.js"></script>
<script src="../../assets/worksheet.js"></script>

<div class="ws-toolbar no-print">
  <div class="ws-controls">
    <button class="ws-btn primary" id="btn-ws-new" onclick="wsGenerate()" disabled>🔄 New Session</button>
    <button class="ws-btn outline" onclick="wsOpenPreview()">👁️ Preview & Print</button>
  </div>
  <div id="ws-loading" class="ws-status">⏳ Loading Python...</div>
</div>

<div id="ws-container"></div>

<div id="ws-preview-overlay" class="ws-modal no-print">
  <div class="ws-modal-header">
    <span id="ws-preview-title-text">Worksheet Preview</span>
    <div class="ws-modal-btns">
      <button class="ws-btn-small print" onclick="wsPrint()">🖨️ Print PDF</button>
      <button class="ws-btn-small close" onclick="wsClosePreview()">✕ Close</button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div id="ws-preview-scroll" class="ws-modal-body"></div>
</div>

<script>
window.WS_CONFIG = {
  title: "Trigonometry",
  unit: "Unit 1 · Trigonometry",
  pyPath: "Trigonometry.py",
  template: "word",
  count: 3,
  types: [
    // 🟢 Easy
    "find_side_sin",
    "find_side_cos",
    "find_side_tan",
    "find_angle_sin",
    "find_angle_cos",
    "find_angle_tan",
    // 🟡 Medium
    "find_side_hyp_sin",
    "find_side_hyp_cos",
    "find_side_hyp_tan",
    "elevation_basic",
    "depression_basic",
    "shadow_flagpole",
    "hill_gradient",
    "train_gradient",
    "elevation_depression_pair",
    "kite_height",
    "ladder_safety",
    "ramp_angle",
    // 🔴 Challenging
    "elevation_word",
    "depression_word",
    "multi_step_two_triangles",
    "multi_step_bearing",
    "two_triangles_vertex",
    "ratio_split_angle",
    "isosceles_split",
    "bearing_triangle",
    "cliff_lighthouse",
    "circle_chord_radius",
    "flagpole_two_elevations",
    "cliff_boat_closer",
    "helicopter_overhead"
  ]
};
</script>
```
